description.zh-Hans: 旋涡扭曲效果。围绕中心点旋转像素，旋转角度向半径边缘逐渐衰减。
description.en: Twirl (swirl) distortion effect. Rotates pixels around a center point, with the rotation angle falling off toward the edge of the radius.

triggers.zh-Hans: 旋涡, 旋转扭曲, 漩涡效果, 扭曲旋转

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 在图像中心应用旋涡扭曲效果。
exampleUsage.en: Apply a twirl distortion effect at the center of an image.
